---
suppress-bibliography: true
---

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
# Daftar Dosen PMPSTI, Departemen Teknik Elektro dan Teknologi Informasi, FT UGM
:::


```{r}
#| label: tbl-lecturers
#| tbl-cap: "Daftar Dosen PMPSTI FT UGM"
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| echo: false
#| results: asis

library(here)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)

big_table <- read.csv(here("appendix/data", "02_daftar_dosen_pmpsti.csv"),
                      check.names = FALSE,
                      fileEncoding = "UTF-8")

if (knitr::is_html_output()) {

  library(DT)

  datatable(
    big_table,
    rownames = FALSE,
    colnames = c("NO", "NAMA", "NIP", "JABATAN", "PANGKAT", "GOL",
                 "JENJANG", "PENDIDIKAN", "HOMEBASE", "STATUS"),
    style = "bootstrap4",
    class = "table-bordered table-condensed table-hover",
    caption = htmltools::tags$caption(
      style = "caption-side: top; text-align: center; color: black;
               font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 10px;",
      "Daftar Dosen PMPSTI FT UGM"
    ),
    options = list(
      pageLength = 10,
      scrollX = TRUE,
      autoWidth = TRUE,
      dom = "lfrtip",
      columnDefs = list(
        list(width = "50px",  targets = 0),
        list(width = "200px", targets = 1),
        list(width = "150px", targets = 2),
        list(width = "200px", targets = 7),
        list(className = "dt-center", targets = c(0, 2, 4, 5, 6, 8, 9))
      ),
      language = list(
        search      = "Cari Dosen:",
        lengthMenu  = "Tampilkan _MENU_ data",
        info        = "Menampilkan _START_ sampai _END_ dari _TOTAL_ dosen",
        paginate    = list(previous = "Sebelumnya", `next` = "Berikutnya"),
        zeroRecords = "Dosen tidak ditemukan",
        infoEmpty   = "Tidak ada data"
      )
    )
  )

} else {
  library(kableExtra)

  cat("\\begin{landscape}\n")

  kable(
    big_table,
    col.names = c("NO", "NAMA", "NIP", "JABATAN", "PANGKAT", "GOL",
                  "JENJANG", "PENDIDIKAN", "HOMEBASE", "STATUS"),
    booktabs  = TRUE,
    longtable = TRUE,
    escape    = TRUE,
    align     = c("c","l","c","l","l","c","c","l","l","c")
  ) |>
    kable_styling(
      latex_options = c("striped", "repeat_header"),
      font_size = 8
    ) |>
    column_spec(1,  width = "0.4cm") |>
    column_spec(2,  width = "3cm")   |>
    column_spec(3,  width = "2.5cm") |>
    column_spec(4,  width = "2cm")   |>
    column_spec(5,  width = "2cm")   |>
    column_spec(6,  width = "0.8cm") |>
    column_spec(7,  width = "1.2cm") |>
    column_spec(8,  width = "3.5cm") |>
    column_spec(9,  width = "2cm")   |>
    column_spec(10, width = "1.5cm") |>
    print()

  cat("\\end{landscape}\n")
}
```
